data.biography: Christopher Jerell Redd is an American comedian and actor. He was a cast member of Saturday Night Live from 2017 to 2022. For his work on the show, he won a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Original Music and Lyrics in 2018 for co-writing the SNL song "Come Back Barack".
data.name: Chris Redd

data.biography: 李宇皓，演员，毕业于湖北工程学院文学与新闻传播学院。2019年，参演的电视剧《破冰行动》播出，在剧中饰演伍仔。2020年，参演电视剧《大神猴》。2022年9月，参演电视剧《狐妖小红娘 月红篇》。其他作品有《恶毒女配的甜蜜反击》。

data.biography: 李宇皓，演員，畢業於湖北工程學院文學與新聞傳播學院。2019 年，參演的電視劇《破冰行動》播出，在劇中飾演伍仔。2020 年，參演電視劇《大神猴》。2022 年 9 月，參演電視劇《狐妖小紅娘 月紅篇》。其他作品有《惡毒女配的甜蜜反擊》。

data.biography:
Dan Li is a British South East Asian actor born and raised in London. Throughout his career, he has built an impressive filmography that spans across genres and platforms.

He has been involved in several award-winning productions: working on the BAFTA award-winning Best British Film I Daniel Blake, the BAFTA children's award winner Horrible Histories, and the Best International Film Luther: The Fallen Sun.
data.name: Dan Li

data.biography:
Robert Upshur Woodward (born March 26, 1943) is an American investigative journalist. He started working for The Washington Post as a reporter in 1971 and now holds the title of associate editor.

While a young reporter for The Washington Post in 1972, Woodward teamed up with Carl Bernstein, and the two did much of the original news reporting on the Watergate scandal. These scandals led to numerous government investigations and the eventual resignation of President Richard Nixon. The work of Woodward and Bernstein was called "maybe the single greatest reporting effort of all time" by longtime journalism figure Gene Roberts.

Woodward continued to work for The Washington Post after his reporting on Watergate. He has written 21 books on American politics and current affairs, 13 of which have topped best-seller lists.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Bob Woodward, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Bob Woodward

data.biography: Lee Chae-min is a South Korean actor. He attended Korea National University of Arts and first made his debut as an actor in 2021.
data.name: Lee Chae-min

data.biography: 韓國男演員、主持人，出生於2000年9月15日。 他於2021年出道，因演出《浪漫速成班》、《名校的階梯》、《今生也請多指教》等作品累積知名度，並在2024年主演NETFLIX劇集《名校的階梯》。 他以190公分的高挑身材和精緻五官被封為「小宋江」，同時也是KBS音樂節目《音樂銀行》的固定主持人，並擅長鋼琴和籃球等才藝。
data.name: 李彩玟

data.biography: Lee Chae Min é um ator e apresentador de TV sul-coreano que nasceu em 15 de setembro de 2000. Ele estudou na Korea National University of Arts e fez sua estreia como ator na série dramática "High Class" em 2021, e seguiu com um papel na série "Love All Play" em 2022. Também em 2022, ele começou a coapresentar o programa musical "Music Bank K-Chart".
data.name: Lee Chae Min

data.biography: 2000 年 9 月 15 日出生於韓國，韓國男演員。2020 年 9 月 15 日 Goldmedalist 透過官網公佈了與李彩玟簽訂專屬合約。
data.name: 李彩玟

data.overview:
Câu chuyện diễn ra tại thành phố Z của Nhật Bản tại thời điểm thế giới đầy những quái vật bí ẩn với sức mạnh ghê gớm đã xuất hiện và gây ra biết bao nhiêu thảm họa.  Nhưng cũng chính tại đây xuất hiện 1 siêu anh hùng đấm phát chết luôn, có thể dễ dàng đánh bại và tiêu diệt những con quái vật này. Cũng chính vì tài năng hiếm có này mà có rất nhiều nghi ngại về khả năng thực sự của vị siêu anh hùng, thậm chí anh không bao giờ nhận được bất kỳ lòng tin nào từ dân chúng.

Siêu anh hùng mạnh nhất thế giới có thể giết bất cứ ai chỉ với một đòn. Nhưng không có gì có thể thách thức anh ta, nên anh ta phải vật lộn với sự buồn chán và trầm cảm.

seasons.name: Kẻ Mạnh Nhất vs Kẻ Đáng Sợ Nhất

data.biography:
Kim Ki-bum (김기범; born September 23, 1991), known professionally as Key (키), is a South Korean singer-songwriter, dancer, actor, fashion designer and television presenter under SM Entertainment. He is a member of the South Korean boy group SHINee.

Aside from group activities, as a singer, he has collaborated with various artists, and formed the duo Toheart with Woohyun of Infinite. He made his debut as a soloist in November 2018 with the release of the digital single "Forever Yours", and his first studio album, Face, was released later that month. His second album, Gasoline, was released in 2022. Key has also contributed to songwriting for himself and Shinee.

As an actor, he was cast in multiple musicals, such as Bonnie & Clyde (2013), Zorro (2014), and Chess (2015). He has since widened his field as an actor by taking part in several television drama roles, like Drinking Solo (2016) and The Guardians (2017).

In 2015, Key became active as a fashion designer and took part in numerous projects. For instance, he collaborated with Bridge Shop House to design Shinee concert outfits, and worked with model Irene Kim and the brand Charm's to design fashion apparel. Due to the success of his works, Key was later appointed as a fashion director for the group. Since 2020, he has gained prominence as a television personality, appearing on the variety shows DoReMi Market and I Live Alone as a cast member. He has received the Excellence Award from the MBC Entertainment Awards in recognition of his variety performances.
data.name: Key

data.biography: 金起範（김기범，Kim Ki Bum），藝名Key（키），韓國歌手、演員、服裝設計師和主持人，2008年以男子團體SHINee成員身分出道。
data.name: Key

data.biography: 金起範（김기범，Kim Ki Bum），藝名 Key（키），韓國歌手、演員、服裝設計師和主持人，2008 年以男子團體 SHINee 成員身分出道。
data.name: 金起範

data.biography:
Amruta Khanvilkar Malhotra is an Indian actress. She was born in Mumbai. She worked in Hindi and Marathi movies and known for her appearance in Ishq Bector's-"Aye Hip Hopper". She is popular for her dancing and participating in Fear Factor: Khatron Ke Khiladi 10. Khanvilkar has appeared in Hindi and Marathi films She has appeared in the films Katyar Kaljat Ghusli and she known for her song "Wajle Ki Bara" from Natarang. She appeared in Meghna Gulzar's Raazi.

She won the seventh season of the dance reality show Nach Baliye with her husband Himmanshoo A. Malhotra. In 2020, she was a contestant of Fear Factor: Khatron Ke Khiladi 10 and was eliminated in Week 5 opposite Adaa Khan.
data.name: Amruta Khanvilkar
Hồng Trang Vấn Giai Nhân
data.overview: Sau khi mất tất cả và rơi vào tình trạng hôn mê, Hứa Tiểu Phi tỉnh dậy giữa một kinh thành sầm uất. Từ hai bàn tay trắng, cô đã vươn lên xây dựng một sự nghiệp kinh doanh hưng thịnh bằng sự chính trực và lòng kiên định. Khi bắt tay cùng mật vụ hoàng gia Từ Tử Kỳ để phanh phui âm mưu thao túng giá cả nguy hiểm liên quan đến thương hội, cuộc hành trình theo đuổi công lý đã dẫn lối cho tình yêu nảy nở. Từ đó, Hứa Tiểu Phi trở thành một thương nhân huyền thoại.

data.biography:
高胤桢（朝鲜语：고윤정 Go Youn-Jung；1996年4月22日－），美术系高才生！绘画能力了得，但因在大学里发觉同样绘画好的人很多，开始对绘画前途产生怀疑，从而开始探索其他行业，在泰坦尼克花絮中开始对影视业感兴趣，从而踏入演员行业，韩国女演员。

2016年3月，曾以《대학내일》第771号的封面模特露面。2019年3月，通过tvN《会读心术的那小子》正式以演员身份出道。2020年1月，与朴宝剑一起出演李承哲的《我非常爱你( Kakao Page Webtoon Moonlight Sculptor OST) MV》，成为热门话题。2020年9月，出演Netflix原创剧《非常校护档案》，饰演“女高中生崔有珍”；随后在2020年12月，出演《Sweet Home》 ，饰演“朴宥莉”，因为超高颜值而受到许多关注。2021年4月，在JTBC电视剧《Law School》中饰演全艺瑟一角。

有着开挂般的演艺生涯，出道作品	《会读心术的那小子》代表作品	《Sweet Home》《Law School》《还魂》《还魂2》
data.name: 高胤桢

data.biography: 高允貞（고윤정，Go Youn-jung），韓國女演員、模特兒。漢字正名為高胤禎。
data.name: 高允貞

data.biography:
Go Youn-jung (고윤정) is a South Korean actress who was born on April 22, 1996. She made her first public appearance as a model for University Tomorrow magazine. She debuted as an actress on the television series He Is Psychometric (2019), followed it with supporting roles in Sweet Home (2020) and Law School (2021), and after her breakthrough role in Alchemy of Souls (2022), has since become one of South Korea's most sought-after actresses.

She is best known for her roles in Moving (2023) and Resident Playbook (2025).
data.name: Go Youn-jung

data.biography: Atriz sul-coreana que fez sua primeira aparição pública como modelo da revista University Tomorrow No. Ela estreou como atriz no drama da tvN Mon-Tue "He is Psychometric" como Kim So-hyun.
data.name: Go Youn-jung

data.biography: Η Γκο Γιούν-γιάνγκ (Go Youn-jung) είναι Νοτιοκορεάτισσα ηθοποιός και μοντέλο. Έκανε το ντεμπούτο της ως ηθοποιός στην τηλεοπτική σειρά He Is Psychometric (2019) και κέρδισε την αναγνώριση για τον δεύτερο ρόλο της στην παραγωγή του Netflix Sweet Home (2020). Είναι επίσης γνωστή για τη δουλειά της στις σειρές Law School (2021), Alchemy of Souls (2022–2023), Moving (2023) και Death's Game (2023–2024), καθώς και στην ταινία Hunt (2022).
data.name: Γκο Γιούν-γιάνγκ

data.biography:
高允貞（朝鮮語：고윤정 Go Youn - Jung；1996 年 4 月 22 日－），美術系高才生！繪畫能力了得，但因在大學裏發覺同樣繪畫好的人很多，開始對繪畫前途產生懷疑，從而開始探索其他行業，在泰坦尼克花絮中開始對影視業感興趣，從而踏入演員行業，韓國女演員。

2016 年 3 月，曾以《대학내일》第 771 號的封面模特露面。2019 年 3 月，通過 tvN《會讀心術的那小子》正式以演員身份出道。2020 年 1 月，與樸寶劍一起出演李承哲的《我非常愛你 ( Kakao Page Webtoon Moonlight Sculptor OST) MV》，成為熱門話題。2020 年 9 月，出演 Netflix 原創劇《非常校護檔案》，飾演“女高中生崔有珍”；隨後在 2020 年 12 月，出演《Sweet Home》 ，飾演“樸宥莉”，因為超高顏值而受到許多關注。2021 年 4 月，在 JTBC 電視劇《Law School》中飾演全藝瑟一角。

有著開掛般的演藝生涯，出道作品 《會讀心術的那小子》代表作品 《Sweet Home》《Law School》《還魂》《還魂 2》
data.name: 高允貞

data.biography:
Go, 22 Nisan 1996'da Güney Kore'nin Seul kentinde doğdu. Go, çağdaş sanat eğitimi aldığı Seul Kadın Üniversitesi'ne gitti.

2016 yılında, şans eseri, ilk olarak üniversite öğrencileri için bir dergi olan University Tomorrow'un 771. sayısı için kapak modeli olarak göründü.

Mart 2019'da tvN'nin Pazartesi-Salı dizisi He Is Psychometric'de Kim So-hyun olarak oyuncu olarak ilk çıkışını yaptı.

İlk çıkışının başında çeşitli resimlere ve reklamlara ek olarak, Ocak 2020'de Park Bo-gum ile birlikte Lee Seung-chul'un "I Love You a Lot" şarkısının müzik videosunda kadın başrol olarak yer aldı ve Kakao Page webtoonu Moonlight Sculptor'ın OST'si olarak kullanıldı ve olağanüstü görünümüyle dikkat çekti.

Eylül 2020'de Netflix orijinal dizisi The School Nurse Files'da 'hazır liseli bir kız olan Choi Yoo-jin' olarak rol aldı ve Aralık ayında Netflix orijinal draması Sweet Home'da Park Yu-ri rolünü oynadı.

Nisan 2021'de JTBC dizisi Law School'da en iyi üniversitenin bir hukuk öğrencisi olan Jeon Ye-seul rolünü oynadı ve ilk birkaç dakikada bile dikkatleri üzerine çekti ve dizinin ortasından itibaren önemli olaylara liderlik eden bir karakter olarak oynadı.

Haziran 2022'de tvN dizisi Alchemy of Souls'un 1 sezonunda 'Naksu' olarak özel bir görünüm kazandı ve Aralık ayında yayınlanan 2 sezonu ile Naksu'nun yüzüne sahip gizemli bir tanrıça olan kadın kahraman 'Jin Bu-yeon' olarak göründü.

Ağustos 2022'de Go, Hunt filmi ile ilk kez ekrana çıktı. Film bir gişe başarısı elde etti ve başarılı bir ekran başlangıcı oldu.

Ağustos 2023'te Disney+ dramasında Moving'de sonsuz oynama yeteneğine sahip bir psişik ve fizik kolejinde öğrenci olan Jang Hee-soo olarak rol aldı.[22] 25 yaşında 19 yaşında liseli bir kız rolünü oynamasına rağmen, rolü hiçbir fark olmadan mükemmel bir şekilde oynadı ve iyi karşılandı. Temmuz 2023'te yönetmen Shin Won-ho'nun yaratıcı olarak katıldığı Resident Playbook dizisinin kadın başrol oyuncusu olarak seçildi. (GyR)
data.name: Go Yoon jung

data.overview: Đại Lý Tự Thiếu Khanh – Trương Dực, mang trong mình mối thù sâu đậm, chấp nhận nhẫn nhịn ẩn mình chờ thời cơ. Bề ngoài, y liên thủ với Cẩm Y Vệ Thẩm Do Chi để truy lùng hung thủ, chuyển từ thế đối đầu sang hợp tác. Nhưng phía sau, y chính là bàn tay thao túng toàn bộ cục diện để thực hiện kế hoạch báo thù. Khi mọi âm mưu đi đến hồi kết, chiếc bẫy công lý được dàn dựng tỉ mỉ bất ngờ thu lưới. Số phận của tất cả mọi người được quyết định khoảnh khắc này, buộc họ phải đưa ra lựa chọn cuối cùng giữa thế giới đầy cạm bẫy.

data.biography:
César Saratxu (28 de diciembre de 1958) es un actor español de cine, televisión y teatro.Comenzó haciendo teatro en escenarios del País Vasco. Posteriormente se trasladó a Madrid a ampliar su formación, pero no fue admitido en la Real Escuela Superior de Arte Dramático. En 1986 se traslada a París, donde entra en la escuela de Jacques Lecoq. En esa ciudad conoció a la que sería su mujer, una actriz sueca con la que posteriormente se trasladó a vivir a Estocolmo, donde fue conocido por sus papeles dramáticos en obras de teatro. En 2002 protagonizó el cortometraje Möte med ondskan, de Reza Parsa, y en ocasiones participó en producciones españolas como el cortometraje Expreso nocturno (2003), de Imanol Ortiz.

Desde septiembre de 2005 se le conoce por su papel de Bernardo Marín en la serie de Telecinco Camera Café, en la que trabajó hasta 2009. Anteriormente ya había interpretado a numerosos personajes en la serie Canalone, emitida en Canal+ (2001), o en Los güebones, unas pequeñas piezas para Internet (2004), todo ello dirigido por Luis Guridi. Más recientemente puso su voz al buitre Diógenes en la película El lince perdido (2008) y trabajó en la serie ¡Fibrilando! (2009), spin-off de Camera Café, también dirigido por Luis Guridi.

data.overview: Khi một phụ nữ trẻ đối mặt với chẩn đoán tử thần, cô tìm đến tà thuật đen tối từ một mụ phù thủy trong khu rừng… nhưng mọi phương thuốc đều phải trả giá.
data.title: Nghi Lễ Mục Rỗng

data.biography: Wang Run Ze (Chinese: 王润泽; pinyin: Wáng Rùnzé, born November 28, 1993 in Huainan, China) is an actor from China. He portrayed Tian Ye in the Meteor Garden reboot in 2018. Wang is also well known for his role in A Little Thing Called First Love.
data.name: Wang Runze

data.biography:
王润泽，1993年11月28日出生于安徽省淮南市，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于安庆师范大学 。

　　2016年，作为旁听生参加湖南卫视原创校园纪实真人秀节目《一年级·毕业季》的录制 。2017年，出演个人首部影视剧《贴身校花之君临天夏》，从而正式以演员身份进入演艺圈 ；同年，在犯罪悬疑网络剧《犯罪心理小组X》中饰演谢磊 [3] 。2019年10月23日主演电视剧《初恋那件小事》在湖南卫视青春进行时剧场首播，在剧中饰演林开拓 。

　　2019年10月，青春校园剧《我凭本事单身》饰演宋司翊

　　王润泽出生于安徽省淮南市，高三时离开老家，来到六安市毛坦厂中学复读 ，由于奶奶去陪读，祖孙二人还被湖南卫视《我的纪录片之陪读》记录下来，后来王润泽考上了安庆师范大学 ；虽然他从小就热爱表演，但为了不再给家里增加经济负担，没有选择上专业的艺术院校，而是选择了更好找工作的财务管理专业 。

　　2016年，作为旁听生参加湖南卫视原创校园纪实真人秀节目《一年级·毕业季》的录制 ；期间，他不仅在上海时装周上走T台秀 ，而且还在毕业舞台剧《仙剑奇侠传》中饰演了卖药小生。

　　2017年，与张语格、乔楚航领先主演玄幻校园网络剧《贴身校花之君临天夏》，这是他的首部影视剧作品，从而正式以演员身份进入演艺圈 ；同年，与张超、米露、李晨浩合作主演根据恐怖悬疑小说《诡案追凶》改编的犯罪悬疑网络剧《犯罪心理小组X》，在剧中饰演犯罪心理小组成员谢磊 ；此外，他还作为大学生意见团成员参加了爱奇艺综艺节目《大学生来了第二季》的录制 。

　　2018年，出演王鹤棣、吴希泽、官鸿、梁靖康联袂主演的青春爱情偶像剧《流星花园》，在剧中饰演田野 ；10月27日，主演的动作医疗救援剧《极速救援》在重庆开机 。

　　2019年7月2日，其参加的腾讯视频全明星篮球竞技真人秀节目《超级企鹅联盟Super3:星斗场》首播 ；10月23日主演电视剧《初恋那件小事》在湖南卫视青春进行时剧场首播，在剧中饰演林开拓 。

　　2019年10月，青春校园剧《我凭本事单身》饰演宋司翊 。

　　祖孙二人相依为命 ；由于家境窘迫，他和奶奶过着省吃俭用的生活 。
data.name: 王润泽

data.biography:
王潤澤，1993 年 11 月 28 日出生於安徽省淮南市，中國內地影視男演員，畢業於安慶師範大學 。

2016 年，作為旁聽生參加湖南衞視原創校園紀實真人秀節目《一年級·畢業季》的錄制 。2017 年，出演個人首部影視劇《貼身校花之君臨天夏》，從而正式以演員身份進入演藝圈 ；同年，在犯罪懸疑網絡劇《犯罪心理小組 X》中飾演謝磊 。2019 年 10 月 23 日主演電視劇《初戀那件小事》在湖南衞視青春進行時劇場首播，在劇中飾演林開拓 。

2019 年 10 月，青春校園劇《我憑本事單身》飾演宋司翊

王潤澤出生於安徽省淮南市，高三時離開老家，來到六安市毛坦廠中學復讀 ，由於奶奶去陪讀，祖孫二人還被湖南衞視《我的紀錄片之陪讀》記錄下來，後來王潤澤考上了安慶師範大學 ；雖然他從小就熱愛表演，但為了不再給家裏增加經濟負擔，沒有選擇上專業的藝術院校，而是選擇了更好找工作的財務管理專業 。

2016 年，作為旁聽生參加湖南衞視原創校園紀實真人秀節目《一年級·畢業季》的錄制 ；期間，他不僅在上海時裝週上走 T 台秀 ，而且還在畢業舞台劇《仙劍奇俠傳》中飾演了賣藥小生。

2017 年，與張語格、喬楚航領先主演玄幻校園網絡劇《貼身校花之君臨天夏》，這是他的首部影視劇作品，從而正式以演員身份進入演藝圈 ；同年，與張超、米露、李晨浩合作主演根據恐怖懸疑小説《詭案追兇》改編的犯罪懸疑網絡劇《犯罪心理小組 X》，在劇中飾演犯罪心理小組成員謝磊 ；此外，他還作為大學生意見團成員參加了愛奇藝綜藝節目《大學生來了第二季》的錄制 。

2018 年，出演王鶴棣、吳希澤、官鴻、梁靖康聯袂主演的青春愛情偶像劇《流星花園》，在劇中飾演田野 ；10 月 27 日，主演的動作醫療救援劇《極速救援》在重慶開機 。

2019 年 7 月 2 日，其參加的騰訊視頻全明星籃球競技真人秀節目《超級企鵝聯盟 Super3:星鬥場》首播 ；10 月 23 日主演電視劇《初戀那件小事》在湖南衞視青春進行時劇場首播，在劇中飾演林開拓 。

2019 年 10 月，青春校園劇《我憑本事單身》飾演宋司翊 。

祖孫二人相依為命 ；由於家境窘迫，他和奶奶過著省吃儉用的生活 。
data.name: 王潤澤

data.name: Bridgerton
data.overview: Tám anh chị em thân thiết của gia đình Bridgerton tìm kiếm tình yêu và hạnh phúc trong xã hội thượng lưu London.

seasons.name: Mùa 1
seasons.overview: Tám anh chị em thân thiết của gia đình Bridgerton tìm kiếm tình yêu và hạnh phúc trong xã hội thượng lưu London. Lấy cảm hứng từ bộ tiểu thuyết bán chạy của Julia Quinn.

seasons.name: Mùa 2
seasons.overview: Nghĩa vụ, khao khát và tai tiếng đan xen khi tử tước Anthony Bridgerton quyết định kết hôn nhưng tìm được địch thủ là cô chị cứng đầu của người anh định cưới.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Khi những người mới ra mắt khao khát trở thành nhân vật nổi bật nhất vũ hội, một cô gái nhút nhát sống hai thân phận tìm thấy ánh sáng giữa những bí mật và bất ngờ.

data.biography: 中国戏曲学院2020级影视表演

data.biography: Lisa Vicari (born February 11, 1997) is a German actress. She is best known for portraying Martha Nielsen in the TV show Dark. She is also known for portraying the lead role of Isi in Isi & Ossi, a Netflix original movie.

Лиза родилась в Мюнхене в 1997 году. В возрасте десяти лет начала посещать курсы театра импровизации, вскоре после чего сыграла свою первую роль в короткометражном фильме «Туннельное зрение» . В 2010 году сыграла в детском фильме «Ханни и Нанни». Год спустя сыграла в постапокалиптическом фильме «2016: Конец ночи». В 2017 году сыграла главную роль в фильме «Луна. С 2017 по 2020 год снималась в телесериале Netflix «Тьма». После окончания школы училась на факультете средств массовой информации в Потсдаме.
data.name: Лиза Викари

data.biography: Lisa Vicari (* 11. února 1997) je německá herečka. Je známá především díky roli Marthy Nielsenové v televizním seriálu Dark. Známá je také díky ztvárnění hlavní role Isi ve filmu Isi & Ossi, původním filmu společnosti Netflix.

Kang Mi Na, most often credited only as Mina, is a South Korean singer and dancer. She was a member of the South Korean girl group, Gugudan (gu9udan). Mina was popularly known as one of the eleven finalists in the Mnet's survival show, Produce 101, which created the girl group, I.O.I. She made her debut as an actress in the 2017 drama, 20th Century Boy and Girl.
data.name: Kang Mi-na

data.biography:
Natalia Wörner ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin und Schriftstellerin.

Ihren Durchbruch hatte sie 1994 in Dominik Grafs Actionthriller Die Sieger. Weitere Bekanntheit erlangte sie als Kommissarin Jana Winter in der Hauptrolle der ZDF-Krimireihe Unter anderen Umständen und als Karla Lorenz in der Titelrolle der ARD-Fernsehreihe Die Diplomatin.
data.name: Natalia Wörner

data.biography: 间宫康弘（1981年12月7日—），日本男性配音员。出身于千叶县。身高173.5cm。AB型血。Kenyu Office所属。高中毕业后，进入日本工学院专门学校学习2年。

data.biography: 間宮康弘（1981 年 12 月 7 日—），日本男性配音員。出身於千葉縣。身高 173.5cm。AB 型血。Kenyu Office 所屬。高中畢業後，進入日本工學院專門學校學習 2 年。

data.biography: Elvis Tsui Kam-Kong, also known as 徐錦江, is a Chinese actor based in Hong Kong. He is primarily known for his roles in erotic films and martial arts films, where he's more often cast as villains.
data.name: Elvis Tsui Kam-Kong

data.biography: 徐锦江（Elvis Tsui）出生于黑龙江，毕业于广州美术学院，主修绘画，美术大师关山月的关门弟子，1982年到港发展，曾举行画展，亦从事过模特和夜总会歌手。1987年正式踏入电影圈，在八十年代到香港后被麦当雄导演赏识，以《省港旗兵续集》入行，后来曾经拍摄过多部三级片。他因在周星驰电影中的演出而被许多观众熟悉，现在在内地发展，以拍摄电视剧为主。
data.name: 徐锦江

data.biography: 徐錦江（英語：Elvis Tsui Kam Kong，1961年10月13日－），出生於黑龍江省牡丹江市，是香港男演員及畫家，也擅長藝術創作，畢業於廣州美術學院，師承已故嶺南畫派國畫大師關山月。
data.name: 徐錦江

data.biography: Từ Cẩm Giang là một nam diễn viên người Trung Quốc hoạt động tại Hồng Kông. Bắt đầu nổi tiếng với thể loại phim cấp ba hồi thập niên 1990, cho đến nay anh là một diễn viên gạo cội của điện ảnh Hồng Kông với nhiều vai diễn phụ đặc sắc, đặc biệt là những vai phản diện.
data.name: Từ Cẩm Giang

data.biography:
徐錦江，香港男演員及畫家，也擅長藝術創作，畢業於廣州美術學院，師承已故嶺南畫派國畫大師關山月。

徐錦江在 1981 年來到香港發展，初期曾開個人畫展，但其作品不獲香港人注意。他也曾於入行前當過模特兒和夜總會歌手。1981 年考入第 10 期無綫電視藝員訓練班，著名的同期同學有劉德華、吳家麗、梁家輝、戚美珍、張之亮、黃耀明等，1983 年正式踏入電影圈。由於外型較剛強且兇悍，徐多數飾演反派，如《省港旗兵 2》中之李向東、《省港旗兵 3》中之毛向陽。曾演出三級片，例如在《色情男女》中的飾演一位性無能的三級片演員，使他第二次獲得 1997 年最佳男配角提名。此前於 1994 年，亦憑《水滸傳之英雄本色》魯智深一角首次獲得香港電影金像獎最佳男配角提名。而他曾有十年時間患上抑鬱症。由於拍攝了不少三級電影和一本寫真集《形神集》，令徐錦江與母親和胞妹的關係轉差。他之所以會拍攝三級作品是因為他認為演員應該要有多面性，不只侷限在一個方面演出。
data.name: 徐錦江

data.biography:
Tom Pelphrey is an American actor. Tom was born and raised in New Jersey. He grew up in the town of Howell and attended the Fine and Performing Arts Center at Howell High school. He received a BFA in Acting from Mason Gross School of the Arts at Rutgers University where he also had the opportunity to study Shakespeare at the Globe Theatre in London, England.

Tom's first professional job was on the long running CBS daytime show, Guiding Light. In two and a half years on the show he was nominated for four consecutive Daytime Emmy Awards; he won twice. (2006, 2008) Since then he has worked in theater, television, and independent film. His first lead role in a film was playing the crystal meth addict David in Junction alongside Michael O'Keefe, David Zayas and Anthony Rapp. That led to lead roles in other features including the romantic comedy, Excuse Me for Living, where he worked with Jerry Stiller, Christopher Lloyd, Dick Cavett, and Robert Vaughn. He eventually became a series regular on the hit Cinemax show "Banshee" playing ex neo-nazi Kurt Bunker.

Tom is a founding member and the current Artistic Director of the Apothecary Theatre Company; a NYC based not-for-profit that develops and produces world premieres of new plays by up and coming playwrights. He made his Broadway debut in 2012 as Judy Garland's last husband, Mickey Deans, in the critically acclaimed "End of the Rainbow", directed by Tony Award winner Terry Johnson.
data.name: Tom Pelphrey

data.biography:
Tom Pelphrey (* 28. Juli 1982 in Howell, New Jersey) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.  Er ist seit 2004 als Schauspieler aktiv und übernahm zunächst die Rolle des Jonathan Randall in der Seifenoper Springfield Story, die er bis 2009 spielte. Auch in der Seifenoper Jung und Leidenschaftlich – Wie das Leben so spielt wirkte er mit. Für seine Darstellung in erstgenannter Serie gewann er zwei Emmy Awards in der Kategorie Outstanding Younger Actor. Daneben übernahm Pelphrey auch Gastrollen in Serien wie Numbers – Die Logik des Verbrechens, Ghost Whisperer – Stimmen aus dem Jenseits, CSI: Miami und Good Wife. 2015 übernahm er die Rolle des Kurt Bunker in der Serie Banshee – Small Town. Big Secrets., die er bis 2016 spielte.

Von 2017 bis 2018 war er als Ward Meachum in einer Hauptrolle in der Netflix-Serie Marvel’s Iron Fist zu sehen. 2020 übernahm er mit Beginn der dritten Staffel der Netflix-Originalserie Ozark die Rolle des Ben Davis.

data.name: ทอม เพลฟรีย์

data.biography: Born in Hokkaido, 1955. In 1970, she made her acting debut in "Kōkōsei Burusu" in her original stage name Keiko Sekine. Since then, she has appeared in numerous films over a 50 year career in television, film, stage and commercials. Her hit films include "Tattoo Ari" (1982), "Hana monogatari" (1989) and "Fumiko no Umi" (2007). She has received awards including the 3rd Asahi Performing Arts Award, the Akiyama Matsushiyo Award (2004), the 62nd Mainichi Film Competition, Supporting Actress Award (2008), and the 64th Mainichi Film Competition Tanaka Kinuyo Award (2010).
data.name: Keiko Takahashi

data.biography: Keiko Takahashi (Shibecha, Japó, 22 de gener de 1955) és una actriu japonesa. Abans de casar-se amb el director Banmei Takahashi el 1982, es va posar el seu nom de soltera Keiko Sekine.
data.name: Keiko Takahashi

data.biography:
尹正，1986年12月30日出生，毕业于星海音乐学院流行音乐系2006级本科，中国内地男演员。

2011年，参演了中文版音乐剧《妈妈咪呀》。2012年，参演话剧《鹿鼎记》。2013年，在古装喜剧《龙门镖局》中饰演“山鸡”一角，正式进入演艺圈。2014年，参演的奇幻惊悚题材好莱坞电影《绝命航班》上映。2015年，主演校园励志电视剧《红色青橄榄》，首次担任男主角；同年，主演喜剧电影《夏洛特烦恼》；并主演悬爱侦探剧《他来了，请闭眼》，凭借该剧获得第19届华鼎奖“最佳新锐演员”的称号。

2016年，主演民国谍战剧《麻雀》，凭借苏三省一角色获得国剧盛典观众最喜爱的角色演员的荣誉。2017年，主演魔幻爱情喜剧《大话西游之爱你一万年》；同年，主演悬疑动作片《大侦探霍桑》。2018年，主演电视剧《原生之罪》饰演陆离。
data.name: 尹正

data.biography:
Yin Zheng, also known as Andrew Yin, is a Chinese actor and singer born on December 30, 1986, in Baotou, Inner Mongolia, China. He graduated from the Xinghai Conservatory of Music with a degree in pop music. Yin Zheng began his career in the entertainment industry in 2011, participating in the Chinese version of the musical Mamma Mia. His breakthrough came in 2013 with his role in the costume comedy Longmen Express.

He gained widespread recognition for his performance in the 2015 comedy film Goodbye Mr. Loser, where he played Yuan Hua. Over the years, he has starred in various successful TV dramas and films, including Sparrow, Original Sin, and Winter Begonia. His role in Winter Begonia earned him critical acclaim and the "Best Actor in Chinese Modern TV Dramas" award at the 29th Huading Awards in 2020.
data.name: Yin Zheng

data.biography:
尹正，1986 年 12 月 30 日出生，畢業於星海音樂學院流行音樂系 2006 級本科，中國內地男演員。

2011 年，參演了中文版音樂劇《媽媽咪呀》。2012 年，參演話劇《鹿鼎記》。2013 年，在古裝喜劇《龍門鏢局》中飾演“山雞”一角，正式進入演藝圈 。2014 年，參演的奇幻驚悚題材好萊塢電影《絕命航班》上映 。2015 年，主演校園勵志電視劇《紅色青橄欖》，首次擔任男主角 ；同年，主演喜劇電影《夏洛特煩惱》；並主演懸愛偵探劇《他來了，請閉眼》，憑藉該劇獲得第 19 屆華鼎獎“最佳新鋭演員”的稱號 。

2016 年，主演民國諜戰劇《麻雀》，憑藉蘇三省一角色獲得國劇盛典觀眾最喜愛的角色演員的榮譽 。2017 年，主演魔幻愛情喜劇《大話西遊之愛你一萬年》；同年，主演懸疑動作片《大偵探霍桑》。2018 年，主演電視劇《原生之罪》飾演陸離 。
data.name: 尹正
